description: ZoomInfo is a B2B go-to-market platform with contact and company data, buyer intent, and enrichment for sales and marketing.
tagline: B2B contact data and buyer intelligence
overview: ZoomInfo gives B2B sales and marketing teams accurate contact and company data, buyer intent signals, and enrichment to find and reach their ideal customers.
what_is: ZoomInfo is a go-to-market intelligence platform that helps B2B companies find, connect with, and close their ideal customers. It combines a large database of business contacts and company data with buyer intent and AI-driven automation, so sales and marketing teams can target accounts with current information.

It is widely used for lead generation, account prioritization, and real-time intent insights across sales development, account management, demand generation, and revenue operations. Teams typically use it to speed pipeline growth and keep CRM records enriched.

ZoomInfo integrates with CRM, email, and marketing platforms to enrich data and sync workflows. It is not a standalone CRM or marketing automation suite, so it works best paired with those systems for full funnel coverage.
